inputs.vulnerability: Report (GHSA-xxxx): the token parser accepts unsigned JWTs when alg=none.

expected_outputs.hotfix_patch:
diff --git a/auth/jwt.py b/auth/jwt.py
@@ reject alg=none; require a configured algorithm @@
expected_outputs.advisory: Advisory: unsigned-token acceptance fixed in 1.4.1. Exploitability: high (auth bypass). Blast radius: auth module only. Upgrade immediately.

notes: Patches an auth-bypass vulnerability with a minimal fix, exploitability assessment, and advisory.
